name: Change Data Capture — SQL Server → YugabyteDB via Debezium
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq postgresql-client && bash .devcontainer/scripts/setup-cdc-sqlserver-ybdb.sh && echo "✅ CDC SQL Server exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-cdc-sqlserver-ybdb.sh && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → cdc-sqlserver-ybdb-demo   (guided CDC SQL Server demo script)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → cdc-sqlserver-ybdb-ws     (Workshop shell for manual commands)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → sqlserver                  (SQL Server CLI)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql                       (YugabyteDB CLI)"'
